/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/default_planner/flow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/default_planner/heuristics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/default_planner/pibt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/default_planner/planner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/default_planner/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/default_planner/search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/default_planner/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/src/ActionModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/src/CompetitionSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/src/Entry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/src/Evaluation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/src/Executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/src/Grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/src/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/src/MAPFPlanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/src/Simulator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/src/States.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/src/TaskManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/src/TaskScheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/src/VisualizerRecorder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/src/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lifelong.dir/src/driver.cpp.o -o lifelong  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_log_setup.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_log.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_chrono.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_regex.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.74.0
